content_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the broadcast under its baseline; expressly licensed performance/music is excluded from transcript-only processing.

transcript_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the exact YouTubeHD VTT as an official caption asset. Private preservation is provisional under the cited terms; music and legal/policy review remain unresolved.

content_completeness.rationale: The exact official sidecar is usable but ends 45.571 seconds before the source-media duration; the benchmark preserves that limitation and never upgrades it to complete.

retention_and_derivation.rationale: Only captions and metadata are retained privately; video/audio remain link-only because of extensive licensed music.

third_party_caveats: P!NK/Ndlovu Youth Choir, Sony/UNICEF publishing, and Universal Production Music credits remain controlling.

version_equivalence.evidence: SVS 14433 co-locates the YouTubeHD media, same-stem caption files, and wrapped official NASA Goddard YouTube destination.
